items.kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — AWS Warns Outbound Traffic Blind Spots Can Enable Cloud Data Exfiltration — Anomalous Activity Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-06-23T18:25:14Z
let lookback = 1d;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where EventID in (4625, 4648, 4728, 4740, 4776)
| summarize FailureCount = count(), DistinctTargets = dcount(TargetUserName)
    by IpAddress, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where FailureCount > 10 or DistinctTargets > 5
| extend Severity = "MEDIUM", CVE = "AWS Warns Outbound Traffic Blind Spots Can Enable Cloud Data Exfiltration", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by TimeGenerated desc
items.suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX AWS Warns Outbound Traffic Blind Spots Can Enable Cloud Data Exfiltration Exploitation Attempt - GENERIC"; flow:established,to_server; content:"|90 90 90 90|"; rawbytes; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:7220119; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-06-23, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)

items.title:
CVE-2026-12725: A heap-based buffer overflow was found in dnsmasq. When DNSSEC validation and
query logging are both enabled, logging of
items.description:
A heap-based buffer overflow was found in dnsmasq. When DNSSEC validation and
query logging are both enabled, logging of DS or DNSKEY replies containing
unsupported algorithm or digest types can cause dnsmasq to write past the end
of an internal logging buffer. A remote attacker able to supply such a DNS
response may crash the dnsmasq process, resulting in denial of service.

items.title: CVE-2026-52725: Angular is a development platform for building mobile and desktop web applications using TypeScript/JavaScript and other
items.description: Angular is a development platform for building mobile and desktop web applications using TypeScript/JavaScript and other languages. Prior to 22.0.0-rc.2, 21.2.15, 20.3.22, and 19.2.23, an issue in the @angular/core package allows bypassing script-execution restrictions during dynamic component creation. Specifically, the dynamic component instantiation mechanism (createComponent) failed to reject mounting components directly onto a or namespaced script element (such as ). This enabled the initialization of custom components on a tag that executes scripts, allowing attackers to hijack or inject script-executing hosts. This flaw enables an attacker who can control the host element or selector parameter passed to createComponent to initialize or mount an Angular component directly onto a tag, leading to execution of untrusted code or client-side Cross-Site Scripting (XSS). This vulnerability is fixed in 22.0.0-rc.2, 21.2.15, 20.3.22, and 19.2.23.

items.title: CVE-2026-7166: Vulnerability involving the exposure of sensitive data provided without adequate protection. The API exposes email and p
items.description: Vulnerability involving the exposure of sensitive data provided without adequate protection. The API exposes email and phone number data from the email and telefon fields. This vulnerability is also present in the local database, as it contains accessible sensitive information such as data on minors and municipal users. Successful exploitation of this vulnerability could allow an unauthenticated remote attacker to gain access to sensitive information and data.

items.title: CVE-2026-56422: Multiple MISP core controllers and model capture paths accepted client-controlled request fields such as primary keys (i
items.description:
Multiple MISP core controllers and model capture paths accepted client-controlled request fields such as primary keys (id) and ownership/scope foreign keys (event_id, org_id, user_id, sharing_group_id, galaxy_cluster_uuid, organisation_uuid, and related nested object identifiers) without consistently stripping, pinning, or revalidating them against the server-authorized object.

In affected paths, an authenticated user with access to one authorized object could submit crafted REST or form payloads that caused MISP to save data against a different object than the one checked by the authorization logic. Depending on the endpoint, this could allow object overwrite, object re-parenting, ownership transfer, unauthorized sharing-group scoping, event/object injection, proposal retargeting, or stored attacker-controlled content appearing in another users context.

The fixes harden affected create/edit/import flows by stripping client-supplied primary keys on create-only saves, re-pinning rout

title: SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-56422 Multiple MISP core controllers and model capture paths accepted c
id: 16bc0b8a-6d16-57f4-a194-a1187029c9c5
status: experimental
description: |
    Detects exploitation attempts related to CVE-2026-56422 (Web Application).
    Generated by CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v166.2.
    Severity: MEDIUM | Class: GENERIC
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
    - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-56422
author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX Detection Engineering
date: 2026/06/23
modified: 2026/06/23
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: network_connection
    product: generic
detection:
    selection:
        EventID:
            - 4625
            - 4648
            - 4728
        LogonType: 3
    condition: selection
falsepositives:
    - Legitimate administrative access
    - Service account activity
level: medium
items.kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-56422 — Anomalous Activity Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-06-23T18:25:14Z
let lookback = 1d;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where EventID in (4625, 4648, 4728, 4740, 4776)
| summarize FailureCount = count(), DistinctTargets = dcount(TargetUserName)
    by IpAddress, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where FailureCount > 10 or DistinctTargets > 5
| extend Severity = "MEDIUM", CVE = "CVE-2026-56422", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by TimeGenerated desc
items.suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX CVE-2026-56422 Exploitation Attempt - GENERIC"; flow:established,to_server; content:"|90 90 90 90|"; rawbytes; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:1979295; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-06-23, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)
items.confidence_rationale: High confidence based on: CVSS score 9.5 (Critical); EPSS score 0.362 (elevated exploitation probability)
items.recommended_sla_action: SCHEDULED PATCH — Apply in next maintenance window
items._tier_notice: Upgrade to PRO for full enrichment: actor attribution, kill chain, IOC hashes, AI analysis, STIX bundle.

items.title: CVE-2025-66389: GitHub Copilot 1.372.0 allows filesystem access outside of a workspace folder (without user approval) via a file-handler
items.description: GitHub Copilot 1.372.0 allows filesystem access outside of a workspace folder (without user approval) via a file-handler URI parameter to fetch_webpage. Therefore, exfiltration could occur if there is indirect prompt injection.
items.apex_ai_summary: [HIGH] CVE advisory. Risk score 7.5/10. Full APEX AI analysis available to Pro subscribers.
items.ioc_note: Actor-attribution campaign — IOC set derived from threat actor research, not automated feed extraction.

apex.ai_summary: [P1] CVE / Vulnerability - high severity (Risk 7.5/10). MITRE ATT&CK mapped: T1041 (1 technique). 1 indicator detected - upgrade to Pro for full IOC access. AI confidence: LOW (25%) - limited source data available.
apex.recommended_action: CRITICAL PRIORITY - Patch within 24-48 hours. Activate IR playbook. Notify SOC lead and CISO.

ioc_paywall.message: 1 IOC(s) at 7.0% confidence - unlock with Pro tier.

items.title: CVE-2026-7167: The vulnerability arises when the system fails to properly validate the 'email' field during the authentication process,
items.description: The vulnerability arises when the system fails to properly validate the 'email' field during the authentication process, allowing unverified or fake email addresses to be accepted. This lack of validation enables the creation of user accounts with fake email addresses, facilitating the mass creation of fraudulent accounts. Successful exploitation of this vulnerability could allow an authenticated attacker to carry out various attacks, such as mass spam distribution, system abuse, or bypassing user controls, thereby compromising the security and integrity of the system.
items.apex_ai_summary: [MEDIUM] CVE advisory. Risk score 5.0/10. Full APEX AI analysis available to Pro subscribers.

apex.ai_summary: [P3] Vulnerability - moderate severity (Risk 5.0/10). No MITRE ATT&CK techniques mapped - limited adversarial context. 1 indicator detected - upgrade to Pro for full IOC access. AI confidence: LOW (22%) - limited source data available.
apex.recommended_action: STANDARD PRIORITY - Schedule patch within 7 days. Deploy detection rules. Monitor SIEM for related indicators.

ioc_paywall.message: 1 IOC(s) at 7.0% confidence - unlock with Pro tier.
